rules.description: Target path must include the guidance config file.
Guidance config must be valid JSON and include a docs string array.
All configured markdown docs must exist.
Markdown docs should include a ## Table of Contents heading.
Configured exemption ledger entries must include the required metadata.
Exemption ledger entries must not remain past removeBy.
Deprecated icon package imports are disallowed. Use @design-studio/ui/icons.
Foundation token references should be replaced by semantic or mapped tokens on product surfaces.
Global or unscoped :focus-visible rules should be replaced with scoped focus selectors.
h-screen should be replaced by dvh-safe shell patterns on product surfaces.
Raw hex colors should be replaced by semantic design tokens.
Raw pixel values should be replaced by spacing/typography tokens.
Arbitrary tracking utilities should be replaced by semantic text roles or token-backed styles.
